creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Victor Sudakov from comment #4)
I wouldn't object, but I don't feel strongly about it:

     These options are available:

     -l     In addition to filesystem type, print filesystem label if
            available.                                             ^^
            ^^^^^^^^^

(In reply to Victor Sudakov from comment #5)
I don't know anything about special_media or whether it can depend on utilities outside of base.  That's probably its own bug.
